---
name: "🏢 Add / update a company or product"
about: Add a new chip/company, or correct a spec, price, or piece of news
title: "[company] "
labels: ["company", "help wanted"]
---

## What needs adding or correcting?
- **Company / product:**
- **Field:** (architecture / TOPS+precision / power / memory / price / SDK / news / status)
- **Proposed value:**

## Source (required)
- **Primary source + date:** (vendor newsroom, official docs, SEC/press, or named outlet)
- **Is the figure vendor-claimed or independently measured?**

## Notes
<!-- TOPS must state precision (INT4/INT8/FP4). Keep it vendor-neutral. -->
